textByHashes.0376425d02cf9dd7d45002f7d03dd995f69f6ea5: Leave this temple at once, or I shall be forced to attack!
textByHashes.6008c577424bfe5d9bf87148f3012446a571ab13: I will defend this door until I am released from this prison of bone...
textByHashes.23e75d1567443d53d84559d6febcb223abf2f8ff: You shall not pass me, unless I crumble into dust!
textByHashes.d60f22b427ac1e4a8b70fc77d1aaabfa1865fe62: These bones that trap me will block your path!
textByHashes.d2afb9aa3d0d6d8bbc7d2c801ecb6917a5cbbed3: Now, flee before I attack you!
textByHashes.b6b01eba7d46946280691d3f2e0ad72dce888c8a: Leave this place, before I am forced to attack!
textByHashes.c5fd04eab21d2ea337c8b0044aed331db7fc978e: If you value your life, young man, then flee!
textByHashes.3877fc959264990afd47df3bdd66a3e70b4b6e09: If you value your life, young woman, then flee!
textByHashes.571088732546fbd056457b997bf9b1f6c15ce004: If you value your life, young one, then flee!
textByHashes.103cd21fbad2166a21757b8462dc4533bf99444f: You should not be here! This is a dangerous place for beings such as you!
textByHashes.676e6a96e8a10ee7ac2a38b530d8428514658f87: I am impressed, young man. You seem to have more resilience than those I have fought off before.
textByHashes.200062564607e15ae228d81586c81b50691151f6: I am impressed, young woman. You seem to have more resilience than those I have fought off before.
textByHashes.aebda717740ddfffd9c815baa0278431318e3482: I am impressed, young one. You seem to have more resilience than those I have fought off before.
textByHashes.1d7039a760c31d14f29c0b1dc5dad5043bf6b675: Perhaps, then, you could help me with my predicament?
textByHashes.688e79b0d8132fd68baa996d09f008ffe005b914: I am trapped in this form against my will... it has been a long and painful struggle to even regain control over my own mind.
textByHashes.60d7c92b28efa4c5ebd5349fd228ae1ad399cc57: As I said, I am trapped like this against my will.
textByHashes.be2f0f7366feb3d6f51e35705f5facf32cebb099: I am forced to defend the one who enslaved me from any harm, even though it disgusts me to do so!
textByHashes.4fc01620171c855c0338cbc68ebb5d24ffcb7afc: SHE has. She was my rival before we came to this world, and supported that upstart Zamorak in his quest to be a god.
textByHashes.8c8bc91c65022e6f5f62c41fe6c4b2e9224b4292: It angers me to think at how she tricked me into slavery...
textByHashes.e20aba266c64abeba7df9fb19079efa0b97d14c1: Her name is Enakhra, and she is the one who made this accursed temple and this boneguard that I am trapped in.
textByHashes.53a7ee46a50f737a7565475c11c564254963ff9e: Now, since you show some interest in my situation, will you help me?
textByHashes.8dd37cec1e101d710649d1a80b58a5ed194a60a6: Certainly, young man. If you help me, I will give you a valuable amulet, and some of my knowledge.
textByHashes.0eee1d55054df64ba44fdbdc21a0bb3ecbce034f: Certainly, young woman. If you help me, I will give you a valuable amulet, and some of my knowledge.
textByHashes.8981c1b15dbde75f215844c7e2c594e96b1b05d7: Certainly, young one. If you help me, I will give you a valuable amulet, and some of my knowledge.
textByHashes.db0a1764c3f56c219e4350ab6fcbfc4f850ecc08: Enakhra keeps me trapped in this form with magic.
textByHashes.75cd3fac979a25aa4a30696b879ccc13f85f5323: Her hold over me grew weaker over the years, and I began to build a wall to keep her trapped in her own temple forever.
textByHashes.9408355b3f5be18be18dc7576ceb2decc7e27c07: Unfortunately, she has strengthened her spells lately, and I can no longer will myself to continue building.
textByHashes.ba017dd52d0d014ab61e6dff532a750c4ef8c7c8: I want you to finish building this wall, that we might seal her in this temple forever, where she cannot taint the world with her creations again.
textByHashes.1e684ce8ddcc0f7f85cfd4d79a48460b25383cb1: There is a pile of rubble nearby, made of blocks that have fallen from the walls and the ceiling over time.
textByHashes.5d777a0077dadee7a3201be97e3cd70611718752: I have been trapped here for several thousand years, after all...
textByHashes.6e61ce3c4d9d4c7e2b59fd86a65803acd02785f0: Is there anything else you wish to know?
textByHashes.55d99c7a4f97c8b04f802f27a63d303aee8da278: Since the blocks are heavy, you will need to be quite strong in order to lift them up to the wall.
textByHashes.4a6ed42902ba4943b3f521fc17ba2b51a1b547ef: Once you have placed the stones up on the wall, you must trim them with a chisel so that they do not fall off when you place the next layer.
textByHashes.e173b5e372700f553bd8f1117d5facd184f5e9c7: I was not far from finishing, I must say. It will most likely only take you three loads to finish building it.
textByHashes.4046966843991c8a876dc42b769d3bb0743dbae2: She is a coward, and a despicable traitor. She even supported Zamorak when he tried to become a god.
textByHashes.3a06e8bc0adaa3b7d365c18b89938a56c9182840: Of course, even though she built a temple for him, he didn't care, and she's been hiding here ever since.
textByHashes.09b0947a1c5bf1e076978a9f2918f2fa78b11e37: I was once a proud mage, and now look at me. Trapped inside a bone skeleton and forced to defend my rival's temple.
textByHashes.4d06a8543ce025ae76af8bf5f90847267a1d14ea: To think I believed her when she said she wanted to become allies and make amends for our rivalry!
textByHashes.bdb436d4baf94e99aea746e16117a8dc2296ebee: I suppose it is our nature, after all.
textByHashes.d10579e7f5349fed44a068ac30b7cbe68974e352: Thank you. Once you are finished, the wall itself will shield me from most of her magic, and I will be free to move once more.
textByHashes.12e786427ef2cfe06aac992786647e8fa40ac661: Thank you. Thank you very much for all your help.
textByHashes.c06f58ef7ed7862dacbe9e69abc8f3ba98957b8f: I can feel Enakhra's control over me fading. Finally, I can be free from this imprisonment...
